programmes.show_description: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
A woman from France is now an organic farmer in Okuma Town in Fukushima Prefecture - the town was affected by the 2011 nuclear accident and she is working to change that image.
Discover the stories behind renowned Japanese products alongside our reporter - this time, smokeless grills.
Roughly 90% of Japan's plastic models are made in Shizuoka, an area whose manufacturing roots date back to shogun Tokugawa Ieyasu - we explore the latest developments for Japan's plastic models.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
This episode explores the vast diplomatic records of the late political scientist Iokibe Makoto, including exchanges with prime ministers which offer insights into navigating today's turbulent world.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Kyoto: Journey through Kyoto's historic Kiyomizu-dera Temple - from its iconic stage and tranquil sacred spring, we unveil the definitive two-hour condensed course while basking in springtime beauty.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Late April: spring has come to northern Japan. Travel the JR Ou and Gono Lines discovering cherry blossoms, hiking in a lush beech forest, soaking in a seaside spring and trying fermented soybeans.
Nostalgia is spreading in Japan for the Showa era (1926-1989) - we introduce electronics, retro designs, and other elements of a period that many Japanese people consider the 'good old days'.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Crafts, fashion, products, buildings, and food: explore a diverse range of Japanese designs and the ideas and values of their creators. Our presenters visit designers at work to reveal new stories.
This show for kids promotes a greater understanding for people with difficulties and helps develop empathy - with the help of two fairies, the main character thinks about what can be done to help.
This proactive science education programme encourages primary and lower secondary school children to discover and investigate the mysteries which puzzle them.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Sushi is an iconic dish of Japan, with nigirizushi being the most popular style - we take a look at its evolution and the creation of key ingredients.
Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan - in this episode, Kyle Card hikes the newly-designated long trail around majestic Mount Fuji and discovers its secrets.
Discover the story behind the 36 Views of Mount Fuji woodprint series. The Great Wave off Kanagawa by Hokusai is not just a huge wave, and the boat caught in the wave is there for a reason.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programmes.show_name: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programmes.show_description: Shibuya is one of Japan's most famous tourist spots, but the low-lying city is also at risk of flooding and earthquakes - we look at Shibuya's advanced efforts to prepare for disasters.
Shiga / Nagayama Yuko (architect). For 400 years, a group of stonemasons have been building walls using natural stone. Nagayama learns how a stone's qualities are assessed and utilised.
Kataoka Ainosuke takes his first turn as our host. Ainosuke is a renowned kabuki actor. He'll be our guide to the attractions of kabuki looking at some of the roles he's played.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

A shrine in Kumamoto Prefecture was razed in the 2016 earthquake, but its seven-year restoration fused traditional craftsmanship with the latest technology.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Japan's exciting music scene with pop, rock, traditional, live performances, artist interviews, all the latest news, video releases and more!
An animated series about a Japanese dog who gets lost in New York City. Charo says 'I want to see my owner again!', and so he starts his adventure to find his way back home. (S1, E01)
Frozen food products widely available in Japan include hundreds of pasta dishes and even sushi - new flash-freezing techniques are improving quality, reducing food waste, and driving innovation.
We visit Lake Biwa, Japan's largest and oldest lake, as a cat leads us to an overlook with a great view of the lake and another cat hides among the multitude of wares at a Shigaraki ceramics shop.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Selected highlights from 'Cycle Around Japan'! Bicycle through inspiring scenery, meet the locals, and discover the living traditions of a hidden Japan.
After having an accident one day, Mee wondered, 'Maybe I don't need underpants?' Through interviews with passers-by and a wild imagination, Mee searches for reasons to wear underpants.
Under the Lid: Design is fun - design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Located on Terceira Island about 1000 kilometres off of the coast of Portugal, the designated World Heritage Site of Angra do Heroismo is a port town which flourished during the Age of Exploration.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
A curry rice bento made with local spices and beef comes in Arita porcelainware, a 400-year-old art treasured by royalty - its rich heritage is sure to enhance your travel memories.
Tsubo-niwa - life enhanced by quintessential spaces. Dive deep into the beauty of the ancient capital which is still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.
Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical and effective workplace expressions, understand business culture, and improve your kanji.
Nakajima Deco is obsessed with finding ways to live a waste-free life - diners at her cafe are served vegetables (peels, leaves and all) conveying the value of life through her cooking.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
A winter journey on the newly-built Taklamakan Desert railway traces the path of the Silk Road - the line reveals the descendants of ancient cultures and brings changes to local communities.
